event_name: Wirecard AG accounting fraud disclosure and insolvency (June 2020)
description: On 2020-06-18 Wirecard AG (WDI) disclosed that EUR 1.9 billion in cash reported on its balance sheet 'likely does not exist'; the CEO resigned the next day. The company filed for insolvency on 2020-06-25, wiping out equity holders. This was accounting-fraud-specific, not sector-wide: peers such as Adyen and PayPal were not materially affected on the window.
primary_sources: Wirecard AG ad-hoc release, 2020-06-18: statement that EUR 1.9B in trust-account cash 'likely does not exist'.
Wirecard AG insolvency filing at Munich District Court, 2020-06-25.
provenance_note: News observations pulled from GDELT DOC 2.0 for the window; regulatory anchors sourced from Wirecard AG's own disclosures and BaFin releases.

affected.realized_event: Insolvency filing 2020-06-25; common equity effectively wiped out.

controls_should_not_flag.reason: Non-fintech DAX name; unrelated to Wirecard-specific fraud. Elevated/high flag would be a false positive.
